name: Noah Howard
abstract: Noah Howard (April 6, 1943 – September 3, 2010) was an American free jazz alto saxophonist.

concerts.label: Jazz Concert featuring Noah Howard and Frank Wright

about_quotes.speaker: Dave Liebman
about_quotes.evidence: Like if Noah Howard comes back, who just passed. He was in the avant garde.
